rows.label: tev072401_JNK0010
rows.name: Inquire[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_SEL0011
rows.name:
Ask Kan'tonam how he
feels about humanity.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_JNK0020
rows.name: Discuss[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_SEL0021
rows.name: Ask Kan'tonam about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0001
rows.name:
You crushed Goetia and fought off
countless numbers of Growth soldiers.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0002
rows.name:
To us Orphe, you humans are both a
reliable friend and an object of fear.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0003
rows.name:
We're grateful for your strength when you
protect us, but what if you turn that strength
against us when we're no longer needed?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0004
rows.name:
We would have no power to defend
ourselves. You could eradicate
our species in an eyeblink.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0005
rows.name:
That is why Yin'tonam and myself
are constantly striving to
understand what motivates humans.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0008
rows.name:
I find something compelling about the mission of
the Testament. To think they spend all their days
gathering the remains of your White Whale...[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0009
rows.name:
This is why I have decided to
join BLADE myself. I look
forward to working with you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0010
rows.name:
I have no aptitude for combat,
of course, but my ability to
sense danger is quite keen.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0011
rows.name:
That proved sufficient to get
me past the aptitude tests.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_SEL1021
rows.name: Ask Kan'tonam about recent developments.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0021
rows.name:
I have never fully trusted humanity. I've always
been waiting for the other shoe to drop, as I think
you say. But I now feel that I have misjudged you.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0022
rows.name:
You treat entirely different
species—like we Orphe and the
Ma-non—just as you do your own kind.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0023
rows.name:
My Ovah has no memory of the Orphe
ever being shown such kindness.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0024
rows.name:
The idea of helping others even
when you yourself are in peril
would never occur to the Growth.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0013
rows.name:
Thanks to you, I managed
to return here safely.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0014
rows.name:
The experience had left me interested
in attempting a bath, as per Anna's
impassioned recommendation.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0015
rows.name:
But as soon as I entered the hot
water, my skin began to swell up.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0016
rows.name:
If you humans bathe in order to disinfect
yourselves, wouldn't bathing IN disinfectant
be a more efficient way of reaching your goal?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev072401_MSG0017
rows.name:
Nevertheless, I may suggest a bath to
Yin'tonam. His skin is especially
hard, so it might be ideal for him.[ST:wait ]
